compiled_state.title: RED: Add confidence tagging tests to test-project-detect.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body:
## Description

Modify tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh to add tests asserting confidence fields in project-detect.sh output. Add new tests at the END of the file and set a RED marker in .test-index.

### Specific failing tests to write:
- test_confidence_tagging_stack_confirmed: Creates fixture dir with pyproject.toml, runs project-detect.sh, asserts stack_confidence=confirmed in output
- test_confidence_tagging_targets_confirmed: Creates fixture with Makefile containing real targets, asserts targets_confidence=confirmed
- test_confidence_tagging_db_inferred: Creates fixture with code importing sqlalchemy (no docker-compose), asserts db_confidence=inferred
- test_confidence_tagging_db_confirmed: Creates fixture with docker-compose.yml containing postgres image, asserts db_confidence=confirmed
- test_confidence_tagging_files_present_confirmed: Creates fixture with CLAUDE.md, asserts files_present_confidence=confirmed
- test_confidence_tagging_installed_deps_confirmed: Runs detection on any fixture, asserts installed_deps_confidence=confirmed (since command -v is used)

### Test approach
Each test creates a temp fixture directory, runs bash project-detect.sh <fixture-dir>, captures output, and uses the existing get_key helper to extract *_confidence values. Tests will fail (RED) because project-detect.sh does not yet output confidence fields.

### .test-index RED marker
Add entry: plugins/dso/scripts/project-detect.sh: tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh [test_confidence_tagging_stack_confirmed]

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh (modify — add tests at end)
- .test-index (modify — add RED marker)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes with RED-marked tests tolerated
  Verify: bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes
  Verify: ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null; true
- [ ] At least 6 new confidence-tagging test functions exist
  Verify: grep -c 'test_confidence_tagging' tests/scripts/test-project-detect.sh | awk '{exit ($1 < 6)}'
- [ ] .test-index has RED marker for project-detect.sh
  Verify: grep -q 'project-detect.sh.*\[test_confidence_tagging' $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/.test-index
comments.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Fixed: Added 6 RED confidence tagging tests to test-project-detect.sh (stack, targets, db_inferred, db_confirmed, files_present, installed_deps)
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
